# Ui.IsResourceUiMeta method

Returns `true` when *value* is a well-formed `ResourceUiMeta` — a JSON object whose OPTIONAL members (`csp`, `permissions`, `domain`, `prefersBorder`) are each of the correct shape when present (spec §26.4). Round-trips through the typed record.

```csharp
public static bool IsResourceUiMeta(JsonNode? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate hints object (raw). |

## Return Value

`true` when well-formed.
